goal: Choose an outer sector that can become our own factory, prioritizing safe support chains before heavy anchors.
main_idea: Penalize contested heavy-anchor rushes, reward support-before-anchor density and enemy-distance margin, then let the rollout queue build cheap support -> anchor -> expansion.
notes: This branch intentionally changes the lane-choice objective: heavy anchors are expansion rewards, not the first goal, unless the lane already has enough safe support.
